topic_title: Writing specifications across five domains — health, transport, education, food, scheduling
verdict: All checks pass. Reading is approved. Word count (~2058) is within the deep-profile target range [1800, 2200]. All five domain examples are present with bad→good→annotation tables. No assessment references. No scope creep. Formatting matches the 3-4 deep-profile gold example bar: bullets, numbered lists, annotation tables, bold-term definitions, inline examples throughout. Primary resource [1] cited in Overview, Key Concepts, three domain 'What changed' blocks, Worked Example, and In Practice.

format_discipline.detail: First non-empty line is the H1 title. Sidecar reading.meta.json present with all required fields. Six sections in correct order.

length.detail: 2058 words, 9.0 reading minutes — both within target ranges.

citations.detail: [1] cited at Overview, Key Concepts intro, Transport 'What changed', Scheduling 'What changed', Worked Example four-property check, In Practice closing sentence. [2] cited at Health 'What changed', Food 'What changed', In Practice habit 1. [3] cited at Key Concepts 'If any part is missing', Education 'What changed', What Stays the Same closing sentence, In Practice habit 3. No orphans.

forward_references.detail: No references to 2.8 (spec testing) or 2.9 (iteration). All terms used are prior concepts (testable, bounded, observable, actionable, specification, constraint, input, expected output, failure condition) or this topic's own introduced concepts (four-part spec structure, domain-specific constraint, domain-specific output format, explicit exclusion).

faithfulness.detail: All 10 sampled assertions trace to the corpus: four-part structure (§5.1), all five weak/strong spec pairs (§5.2–5.6 verbatim), 'what does not change / does change' pattern (§5.7), anti-patterns table (§8), explicit exclusion habit (§8 'Do:' bullets). No new content introduced.

undefined_terms.note: New terms 'metric', 'time range', 'output shape' bolded and defined parenthetically at first use in Domain 1 intro. Prior concepts (testable, bounded, observable, actionable) reused without re-definition as permitted. No acronyms introduced without expansion.

jargon_dump.note: Four-part structure introduced via table (one row per part, not a paragraph dump). No paragraph introduces 3+ new terms simultaneously.

abstract_first.note: Each domain section leads with a concrete everyday task type before the bullet definitions of what 'bounded' and 'observable' mean in that domain.

academic_register.note: All sentences are direct and plain. No hedging phrases detected. Average sentence length within normal range.

wall_of_text.note: All prose blocks are 1–4 sentences. Tables and bullets carry structural weight throughout.

unlisted_sequence.note: Worked Example steps rendered as numbered bold headers. Four-property check rendered as a checklist. Anti-patterns rendered as a table. Best-practice habits rendered as a numbered list.

no_inline_examples.note: Weak/strong spec blockquote pairs appear inline within each domain section. Four-part table in Key Concepts includes signal-word examples. Inline examples present throughout, not only in Worked Example.

bold_term_definitions.note: Bold term / plain-meaning shape used for 'metric', 'time range', 'output shape' in Domain 1 intro, and for 'audience' in Domain 3 intro.

assessment_references.detail: No mention of A1, 'Specification Portfolio', 'due Week 3', '10%', or any assessment ID or grade weight. Assessment linkage removed relative to corpus §4 and §5 where corpus mentioned A1.

scope.detail: Reading covers only writing specifications across five domains. Spec testing and iteration are not mentioned. The one-sentence health caution (do not use AI for diagnosis/medication) is a back-reference permitted by the named-and-deferred allowance. No content teaches downstream topics 2.8 or 2.9.

gold_example_bar.note: Formatting density (bullets, numbered lists, annotation tables, bold definitions, inline blockquote examples) matches the 3-4 gold moves. Word count ~2058 is comparable to 3-4's ~1900w and within the confirmed deep target [1800, 2200].
